summary: Completed testing of MyGenie POS Frontend CRM Integration. Login flow works correctly, CRM API endpoints are fully functional, but frontend session management issues prevented complete UI testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Application redirects back to login screen intermittently during testing, preventing consistent access to order entry screen

integration_issues.issue: Unable to consistently access order entry screen from dashboard due to session timeouts

passed_tests: Login flow with credentials owner@pav2.com / Qplazm@10
Application loading sequence (Profile, Categories, Products, Tables, Settings, Popular Items, Running Orders)
Dashboard loading with order cards visible
CRM API customer search by phone '7505242126' - returns 1 customer (Abhishek)
CRM API customer search by name 'Abhishek' - returns 5 customers
CRM API customer lookup by phone - returns customer profile with 10 addresses
CRM API address lookup by phone - returns 2 addresses
CRM API key validation - correctly rejects invalid keys
CRM configuration for restaurant 509 with valid API key
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management issues causing intermittent redirects to login page. The CRM integration backend is working perfectly, but UI testing was limited due to session stability problems. All CRM API endpoints are functional and returning expected data.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 60% (limited by session issues)
